document.docAuthor: Ranasinghe, Sasanka, Eberle, Jonas, Athukorala, Namal, Benjamin, Suresh P. & Ahrens, Dirk
document.masterDocTitle: New species of Sericini from Sri Lanka (Coleoptera, Scarabaeidae). Part II

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: New species of Sericini from Sri Lanka (Coleoptera, Scarabaeidae). Part II

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Zoologisches Forschungsmuseum A. Koenig, Adenauerallee 127, 53113 Bonn, Germany.
